name: Harmony Design System — React + MUI
description: Harmony Design System for existing MUI projects. Exports createHarmonyTheme (colorSchemes + components.Mui* overrides) and custom components only where no MUI equivalent exists. Consumers keep @mui/material APIs unchanged — no Harmony prop wrappers.

descriptions.existing-mui: Theme/restyle stock MUI; consumer keeps @mui/material API
descriptions.custom: Package export when MUI has no equivalent (built on MUI stack)
descriptions.skip: Do not convert; placeholder or accepted gap

readiness.summary: Engineer + QA agents documented with converter-specific equivalence. Review surface on :5176. QA verify proven for demo, foundation, Button; remediate loop documented.
